provenance: Hand-authored design data - GRANADAD ART UNIFIED SPEC v1 section 4.6 / FACES-SPEC.md section 3.3 (retained; path amended, gearWeights renamed headwearWeights). All weights and the actorArchetypes map are (placeholder), needs-blessing register.
notes: An archetype is a weighted VIEW over the one shared part library: integer effective weight = part.weight x product of tagMultipliers over the part's tags (missing tag = x1, 0 excludes, small nonzero = rare-not-never). headwearWeights drive the k=0 class draw (spec 4.3). actorArchetypes maps actor type ids to archetypes; beast types (animal, feral) are deliberately absent - beasts show their actor sprite, not a face (spec 4.6).
